data.title: ParaZero Technologies Ltd. Announces Closing of $4 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: Israel-based aerospace defense company ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: PRZO) has recently completed a registered direct offering with a single institutional investor. The offering involved the purchase and sale of around $4 million worth of ordinary shares and pre-funded warrants, each priced at $0.75 per ordinary share. The company specializes in developing smart, autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems within the global defense industry. The successful completion of this offering will likely bolster the company's financial position and further support its innovative ventures in the aerospace sector.

data.title: Paul Daversa Named “Individual of the Year” as Daversa Redefines Executive Search for the AI Era
data.description: In San Francisco, Daversa revealed that its Founder and CEO, Paul Daversa, has been honored as the "Individual of the Year" in the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards by the Business Intelligence Group. This recognition comes as he successfully transformed Daversa into an AI-focused organization during a pivotal moment. Instead of just adding AI onto existing processes, he integrated it deeply into operations, decision-making processes, talent management strategies, and the company's daily functions. The award underscores his significant contribution to the firm's evolution towards being AI-centric.

data.title: Ezderm Opens API to Preferred Partners with Medsender Integration
data.description: Ezderm, a specialized EHR and practice management platform for dermatology, has recently released a new integration to streamline document routing and referrals. Through this integration, manual front-office processing can be reduced by as much as 80 percent, significantly improving efficiency. The company, based in Naples, Florida, unveiled this development on March 24, 2026. This advancement comes as Ezderm has made its once closed API accessible, allowing for easier integration and greater functionality for users.

data.title: ConceiveAbilities Launches 'Surrogacy Spark Series' Highlighting Why Women Become Surrogates
data.description: ConceiveAbilities, based in Chicago, marked Surrogacy Awareness Month by recognizing the extraordinary women who opt to be gestational surrogates. The Surrogacy Spark Series was introduced, showcasing over 20 women detailing their reasons for becoming surrogates. The program was launched on March 24, 2026.

data.title: Deka Lash Takes Aim at the Medical Aesthetics Industry With Launch of Deka+
data.description: A top lash franchise in North America is introducing injectables, AI-driven personalized treatment plans, and expanding to over 100 studios in the midst of a fragmented industry valued at $17 billion. This development was announced in Pittsburgh on March 24, 2026. The franchise has spent over ten years establishing itself as one of the fastest-growing brands in the region.

data.title: Lexon × Jeff Koons Unveil the Chromatic Collection: a Colorful New Chapter for the Acclaimed Balloon Dog Lamp and Balloon Dog Speaker
data.description: In Paris, the Lexon × Jeff Koons collaboration is evolving with the launch of the Chromatic Collection, following the success of the 2025 inaugural edition. This collection offers colorful updates to the Balloon Dog Lamp and Balloon Dog Speaker. Pre-orders for the eight new models will begin on March 24, 2026, exclusively on lexon-design.com, as part of a limited-time edition. These models retain the iconic translucent body that showcases the internal technology.

data.title: Acumatica 2026 R1 Strengthens Supply Chain Management for Manufacturers, Distributors, and Retailers
data.description: Acumatica, a leading cloud ERP provider for small and mid-sized businesses, has officially launched its latest product update, 2026 R1. This update includes the introduction of AI Studio, a suite of tools that empowers customers to develop and implement AI-driven workflows securely. Additionally, users will have early access to Acumatica’s AI Assistant before its full release later in the year. Specifically designed for manufacturers, distributors, and retailers, this update is set to revolutionize how businesses utilize AI technology to enhance their operations.

data.title: U.S. Hospitality Shows Cautious Readiness Ahead of 2026 World Cup, OysterLink Study Finds
data.description: Projections for hotel demand continue to show a conservative outlook as operators adapt their strategies and address ongoing workforce issues in anticipation of a major global event. As the countdown to the 2026 FIFA World Cup begins with less than 100 days left, the U.S. hospitality sector is actively gearing up for the event.

data.title: McGinnis Lochridge Welcomes Veteran Litigator David Herrold as Partner in Dallas Office
data.description: In Dallas on March 24, 2026, seasoned trial attorney David Herrold, boasting over 30 years of experience handling intricate commercial disputes, has become a partner at McGinnis Lochridge's Dallas office. His addition enhances the firm's impressive litigation team.

data.title: whiskerDocs Data Shows Employers Turn to Veterinary Virtual Care as Demands for Pet Benefits Surge
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in Chicago, there has been a rise in the popularity of high-impact pet solutions. Employers are now incorporating virtual care options into their benefit packages to meet this demand. Among these, pet telehealth stands out as the fastest-growing service. This innovative offering grants access to veterinary professionals around the clock, catering to the needs of pet owners. This shift indicates a significant trend towards prioritizing pet well-being, with a growing emphasis on remote solutions in the pet care sector.
